case_title: WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP VS. ALBERT WILLIAMS JR. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION IS NOT AT ISSUE $1,689.00 RENT, $470.00 COSTS, $740.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $484.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,415.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP SERVED AUG-07-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY RILEY, DANIEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS [NO S.A.S.E. - COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX]
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
DECLARATION OF FOWZIA AMAR IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / ATTORNEY'S DECLARATION REQUESTING POSTING OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 EDDY STREET #228, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $484.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR., ALBERT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
